customer_anxiety_profile: No overt anxiety signals — Kim was cooperative and low-friction throughout. However, she has had no emotional investment built into the appointment, and her husband (co-title holder) was not included in the booking. The closer should expect a potentially distracted or low-commitment opening.

sensitive_topics_raised: Pool heater as primary solar motivation — Kim's stated reason for solar is running a pool heater off solar power, not general bill savings. The closer should anchor the proposal to this use case.
exact_promises_rep_made: Bucky will 'get working on your design' before Monday's appointment.
